Brain.pageSubtitle: Open Aleksandra's MRI here. It is read entirely inside your browser and never uploaded — privacy is built into how this works, not added on top.
Brain.privacyHeading: The file never leaves your computer
Brain.privacyBody: NIfTI volumes (.nii / .nii.gz) are decoded with WebGL2 in this browser tab. There is no upload, no server processing, and no telemetry.
Brain.title: MRI viewer
Brain.dropMriHint: Drag a NIfTI volume here, or use the button above. It is read in your browser and never uploaded.
Brain.privacyNote: This file is read only in your browser — it is never uploaded or sent anywhere.
Brain.canvasControlsHint: Once a volume is loaded, drag to rotate and scroll to zoom.
Brain.openError: Could not open this file. Use a .nii or .nii.gz volume.
Brain.webglError: The viewer could not start — WebGL is unavailable in this browser.

Brief.title: Weekly brief
Brief.subtitle: What the system found in the last seven days, written to read on screen — and to print or save as a PDF for the clinician.
Brief.footer: Prepared for clinical review. The system surfaces and explains; every medical decision rests with Aleksandra's clinicians.
Brief.empty: No weekly brief has been written yet.
Brief.emptyNote: A brief is composed every Sunday from the week's papers, hypotheses, and updates. The first one will appear here.

History.title: History
History.subtitle: Everything BRAIN has done, newest first — what it proposed, what was confirmed, and what was undone.
History.undoNote: Any action can be undone for 24 hours. Reversals are real and recorded here too.

summary.therapyNote: Appended a note to a therapy

History.unreachable: The history feed isn't connected yet.
History.unreachableNote: The activity log will appear here once BRAIN is connected to its database.
History.emptyNote: When BRAIN applies something — a staged email, a logged note — it appears here.

Intake.title: Tell BRAIN something
Intake.subtitle: Type or speak a request, or attach a file. BRAIN reads what you mean and stages an action for you to confirm — nothing is sent on its own.
Intake.placeholder: e.g. “Write to Dr. Hien about Aleksandra's latest EEG.”
Intake.heroPrompt: Ask BRAIN, or leave a note…
Intake.fileNote: This file stays on your device. Describe what you'd like done with it.
Intake.openGmail: Open Gmail → Drafts to review and send. BRAIN never sends on its own.
Intake.noMatchHint: Right now BRAIN can stage messages to your contacts. Try: “write to Dr. Hien about the EEG results.”
Intake.workerDownHint: Your note is kept in the field. Try again in a moment.
Intake.privacy: Files and MRI scans never leave this device.

Research.title: Research
Research.subtitle: Everything the system is reading for Aleksandra — papers, hypotheses, and therapy candidates in one place. Every item carries its source; where there is none, it says so.
Research.empty: No research has been ingested yet.
Research.implication: What this could mean for Aleksandra

Activity.title: System Lifeline
Activity.subtitle: Every piece of information the system has added — when it arrived and where it came from.
Activity.notConfigured: The database is not connected — the lifeline is not available yet.
Activity.notConfiguredNote: Once the system is running, this page will fill with its activity.
Activity.noDataNote: When the system ingests its first papers or trials, they will appear here.

Shell.privacy: MRI and DICOM data stay client-side only — read in the browser, never on a server.
Shell.clinician: BRAIN surfaces, ranks, and explains. Every medical decision is made by Aleksandra's clinicians.

Trials.title: Clinical Trials
Trials.subtitle: Active trials Aleksandra may be eligible to join
Trials.emptyEligible: No trials currently meet all eligibility criteria. The system checks weekly.
Trials.notConfigured: The database is not connected — clinical trials are not available yet.
Trials.notFoundNote: This trial may have been removed or the ID is incorrect.
Trials.noMatches: No trials match the selected countries.

Today.statusScanning: The system is reading new research right now.
Today.statusReady: The system is watching the literature.
Today.title: What's new for Aleksandra
Today.lead: While you were away, the system kept reading. Here is what it found, what may need you, and one step you can take now.
Today.tracking: Tracking {papers} papers, {hypotheses} hypotheses, and {therapies} therapy candidates.
Today.attentionEmpty: Nothing is waiting on you right now.
Today.attentionEmptyNote: The system is still reading. New signals will surface here.
Today.weekEmpty: The first weekly brief hasn't been written yet.
Today.weekEmptyNote: A brief is composed every Sunday from the week's findings.
Today.exploreResearchNote: Papers, hypotheses, and therapy candidates — each with its source.
Today.exploreBrainNote: Open an MRI privately, here in your browser.
